evals.name: index-for-payment-queries
evals.prompt: Payment listing queries are slow. They filter by contrato_id and order by fecha_vencimiento. Add a composite index to improve this query pattern.

assertions.text: Creates a composite index on (contrato_id, fecha_vencimiento)
Writes a SeaORM migration file (not raw SQL script)
Places migration in backend/migrations/ with correct timestamp prefix
Does not modify existing migration files

evals.name: schema-design-unidades
evals.prompt: Design a migration to add a 'piso' (floor) column to the unidades table. It should be an optional integer. Also add a check constraint that piso >= 0.

assertions.text: Adds a nullable integer column named 'piso'
Adds a CHECK constraint ensuring piso >= 0
Uses SeaORM migration API (ColumnDef, Table alter)
Migration is reversible (has down method that drops the column)
Does not alter unrelated columns or tables
